_comment: Site config — the ONE place for domain, forms and repo links. The build (build.py) reads this. Paste the Brevo form endpoint URLs into the empty form_action fields once the Brevo account exists; until then forms still soft-gate (they reveal the link) but collect nothing.
tagline_blog: A green CI run doesn't prove the AI agent followed the spec.

newsletter.heading: Get notified when the pro gates ship
newsletter.sub: Case studies and failure patterns from agentic engineering. No spam, double opt-in, unsubscribe anytime.

beta.heading: agentic-gates is currently in closed beta
beta.sub: Pro gates wired into your CI, plus the complete case study with logs. Want in?

ai-build-gate.pitch: A verification gate for AI-written builds: proof anchors checked byte-for-byte against disk, so an agent's "done" is either true or caught.

agentic-gates.pitch: Tier-aware CI meta-gates for agentic engineering: quality, supply-chain hygiene and spec traceability that cannot silently regress.
